allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('docs/data/jobs.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('updated:',d['updated_at']\); print\('count:',d['count']\); [print\(' -',j['company'],'|',j['title'][:50],'|',j['posted_date'][:10],'| end:',j['end_date'][:10] if j['end_date'] else None\) for j in d['jobs'][:8]]")
